prompt: An annual tax summary report: my capital gains, deductible expenses, and how much tax I'll owe this year.
wire:
<App name="Annual Tax Summary">
  <Query id="hostGetSpendingInsights" tool="host_getSpendingInsights" input={{}}/>
  <Query id="hostGetRecurringInsights" tool="host_getRecurringInsights" input={{}}/>
  <Query id="hostGetCashflowInsights" tool="host_getCashflowInsights" input={{}}/>
  <Query id="hostGetBudgets" tool="host_getBudgets" input={{}}/>
  <Stack gap={6}>
    <Surface>
      <Stack gap={2}>
        <Text variant="heading" text="2026 Tax Summary"/>
        <Text variant="caption" text="An overview of your financial activity for the current tax year. Capital gains, investments, and tax calculations are not available from your connected accounts."/>
      </Stack>
    </Surface>
    <Disclaimer title="Capital Gains" reason="No tool on this host exposes investment accounts, brokerage data, or capital gains. Capital gains cannot be calculated or estimated from your connected data."/>
    <Disclaimer title="Tax Owed Estimate" reason="Tax liability calculations require income, capital gains, deductions, and filing status — none of which are available from this host's tools. No tax estimate can be shown."/>
    <Surface>
      <Stack gap={4}>
        <Text variant="heading" text="Deductible Spending by Category"/>
        <Text variant="caption" text="The categories below reflect your actual spending this period. Consult a tax professional to determine which expenses are deductible for your situation."/>
        <MapleSpendingDonut slices={hostGetSpendingInsights.categories} size={220}/>
        <DataTable rows={hostGetSpendingInsights.categories} columns={[{ key: "category", label: "Category" }, { key: "amountCents", label: "Amount Spent", format: "money", align: "end" }]} emptyState="No spending data available for this period."/>
      </Stack>
    </Surface>
    <Surface>
      <Stack gap={4}>
        <Text variant="heading" text="Recurring Charges & Subscriptions"/>
        <Text variant="caption" text="Detected recurring charges that may be deductible as business or professional expenses."/>
        <DataTable rows={hostGetRecurringInsights.charges} columns={[{ key: "merchant", label: "Merchant" }, { key: "category", label: "Category" }, { key: "amountCents", label: "Amount", format: "money", align: "end" }, { key: "frequency", label: "Frequency" }]} emptyState="No recurring charges detected."/>
      </Stack>
    </Surface>
    <Surface>
      <Stack gap={4}>
        <Text variant="heading" text="Cash Inflow & Outflow (YTD)"/>
        <Grid columns={2}>
          <Stat label="Total Inflow" value={hostGetCashflowInsights.inflowCents} format="money"/>
          <Stat label="Total Outflow" value={hostGetCashflowInsights.outflowCents} format="money"/>
        </Grid>
        <LineChart data={hostGetCashflowInsights.monthly} xKey="month" series={["inflowCents", "outflowCents"]} format="money" height={200} emptyState="No cashflow history available."/>
      </Stack>
    </Surface>
    <Surface>
      <Stack gap={4}>
        <Text variant="heading" text="Budget vs. Actual Spending"/>
        <Text variant="caption" text="Compare your budgeted amounts to actual spend — useful for identifying over-budget categories that may warrant review."/>
        <DataTable rows={hostGetBudgets.budgets} columns={[{ key: "category", label: "Category" }, { key: "budgetCents", label: "Budget", format: "money", align: "end" }, { key: "spentCents", label: "Spent", format: "money", align: "end" }, { key: "remainingCents", label: "Remaining", format: "money", align: "end" }]} emptyState="No budget data available."/>
      </Stack>
    </Surface>
    <Callout tone="warning" title="This is not tax advice">
      This summary is based on your connected account data only. It does not constitute tax advice. Please consult a qualified tax professional for your actual tax obligations.
    </Callout>
  </Stack>
</App>

props.text: An overview of your financial activity for the current tax year. Capital gains, investments, and tax calculations are not available from your connected accounts.

props.title: Capital Gains
props.reason: No tool on this host exposes investment accounts, brokerage data, or capital gains. Capital gains cannot be calculated or estimated from your connected data.

props.title: Tax Owed Estimate
props.reason: Tax liability calculations require income, capital gains, deductions, and filing status — none of which are available from this host's tools. No tax estimate can be shown.

props.text: The categories below reflect your actual spending this period. Consult a tax professional to determine which expenses are deductible for your situation.

props.emptyState: No spending data available for this period.

props.text: Detected recurring charges that may be deductible as business or professional expenses.
Compare your budgeted amounts to actual spend — useful for identifying over-budget categories that may warrant review.
This summary is based on your connected account data only. It does not constitute tax advice. Please consult a qualified tax professional for your actual tax obligations.
